productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Women Printed Pink T-shirt
description: CompositionPink round neck T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has cap sleeves, shaped hem, print on front with lace decorationsFitRegularWash careHand wash cold, inside out with mild detergentDo not bleach, dry clean, wring or tumble dryDry flat in shade inside outCool iron inside out do not iron on decorationWear this cute tee from united colors of benetton to bring a sophisticated, feminine charm to your look.  The Audrey Hepburn print is brought to life by lacing embellishments while the soft pink colour will flatter all skin tones.  Wear this top with skinny jeans and heeled sandals.Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
